title: Friends at Lunch Break
synopsis: Three classmates learn how a simple lunch break can turn strangers into friends.
sentences: At lunch break, Amir sat alone with his sandwich and apple.
He watched the other children talking in small groups around the playground.
A boy named Josh walked over and asked if the seat beside Amir was free.
Amir nodded, and Josh sat down with his lunch box.
A few minutes later, Mia joined them with a cup of juice and some crackers.
The three children began talking about their favorite games.
Josh liked football, Mia loved drawing, and Amir enjoyed building things with blocks.
Soon they were laughing about a funny classroom mistake from the morning lesson.
When the bell rang, they did not want the break to end.
Josh asked if Amir wanted to play with them tomorrow.
Amir said yes before he could even think about it.
A quiet lunch break had turned into the start of a friendship.
